description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in SiteBar 3.3.8 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the lang parameter to integrator.php; (2) the token parameter in a New Password action, (3) the nid_acl parameter in a Folder Properties action, or (4) the uid parameter in a Modify User action to command.php; or (5) the target parameter to index.php, different vectors than CVE-2006-3320.
